creator: fcharlier@ploup.net
text:
flask-login 0.5 is broken with recent werkzeug 2.2

It affects users of flexget as reported in bug #265041

flask-login 0.6.2 released a week ago fixes the problem (see https://github.com/maxcountryman/flask-login/blob/0.6.2/CHANGES.md )

Could it be possible to have 0.6.2 in the ports ?

Thanks !
